Red Dragon
Ancient Power plate mail

For each attack on the armor wearer, the attacking enemy receives 10% of the wearer’s current health in damage.
When the damage dealt by this ability reaches 85000, it restores 10000 health to the wearer and his nearest allies.

Requirements: 98-100
